title: neckeria sempervirens
intro: Neckeria sempervirens, also known as the Blue Neckera, is a species of moss that belongs to the family Neckeraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Blue Neckera include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, making it a popular natural remedy for those suffering from asthma and other breathing disorders. Blue Neckera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide relief from respiratory issues.
